data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of live proctor monitoring or AI proctoring. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm the implementation of these proctoring methods. While the linked use case mentions AI proctoring, it lacks specific evidence of how this is achieved, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or entities related to live proctor monitoring or AI proctoring.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the implementation of live proctor monitoring or AI proctoring.
